green_dew_herb.name: Green Dew Herb
green_dew_herb.description: A moist herb gathered from bamboo groves.

bamboo_resin.name: Bamboo Resin
bamboo_resin.description: Sticky resin used as a pill stabilizer.

minor_beast_core.name: Minor Beast Core
minor_beast_core.description: A faint core from low-level spirit beasts.

ember_moss.name: Ember Moss
ember_moss.description: Moss that smolders with residual fire qi.

spirit_iron_shard.name: Spirit Iron Shard
spirit_iron_shard.description: A shard of ore infused with spirit energy.

bandit_token.name: Bandit Token
bandit_token.description: A crude token taken from cliff bandits.

moonlotus.name: Moonlotus
moonlotus.description: A pale flower that blooms only under moonlight.

ancient_dust.name: Ancient Dust
ancient_dust.description: Dust from collapsed ruins, heavy with old qi.

refined_beast_core.name: Refined Beast Core
refined_beast_core.description: A purified core from stronger beasts.

blackwind_key.name: Blackwind Key
blackwind_key.description: Opens the gate to Blackwind Cavern.

affix_stone.name: Affix Stone
affix_stone.description: Can imprint an affix onto equipment.

qi_gathering_pill.name: Qi Gathering Pill
qi_gathering_pill.description: Boosts qi gain from cultivation for a short time.

tempering_pill.name: Tempering Pill
tempering_pill.description: Hardens the body for one adventure or dungeon run.

clarity_pill.name: Clarity Pill
clarity_pill.description: Steadies the mind for breakthrough attempts.

blood_ember_pill.name: Blood Ember Pill
blood_ember_pill.description: Burns with aggressive qi for dungeon combat.

moonwell_tonic.name: Moonwell Tonic
moonwell_tonic.description: Attunes you to rare events in solo adventures.

root_reforging_pill.name: Root Reforging Pill
root_reforging_pill.description: Rare alchemy that reshapes your spirit root.

flow_pill.name: Flow Meridian Pill
flow_pill.description: Opens the meridians for swifter travel — shaves time off your next adventure.

meridian_surge_pill.name: Meridian Surge Pill
meridian_surge_pill.description: Surges qi circulation so your next cultivations return sooner.

gatebreaker_dust.name: Gatebreaker Dust
gatebreaker_dust.description: Grinds dungeon seals — your next dungeon run ignores much of the gate cooldown.

void_pulse_pill.name: Void Pulse Pill
void_pulse_pill.description: A single pulse through every meridian — all major cooldowns shorten for one use each.

spirit_blade.name: Spirit Blade
spirit_blade.description: A forged weapon humming with beast qi.

mistwoven_vest.name: Mistwoven Vest
mistwoven_vest.description: Resin-hardened armor woven from grove materials.

bandit_talisman.name: Bandit's Talisman
bandit_talisman.description: A charm of stolen luck from cliff bandits.

moonwell_pendant.name: Moonwell Pendant
moonwell_pendant.description: Lotus and ancient dust sealed in a spirit focus.
